sentences.target: Die Post ist gleich ums Eck.

translations.de: Die Post ist gleich ums Eck.
translations.en: The post office is just around the corner.
translations.es: La oficina de correos está a la vuelta de la esquina.
translations.fr: La poste est juste au coin de la rue.
translations.it: L’ufficio postale è proprio dietro l’angolo.
translations.pt: Os Correios ficam logo na esquina.
translations.vi: Bưu điện ở ngay sau góc.
translations.ar: مكتب البريد قريب جدًا، خلف الزاوية.
translations.nl: Het postkantoor is om de hoek.
translations.hu: A posta mindjárt a sarkon van.
translations.hi: डाकघर बिलकुल पास है, मोड़ के ठीक बाद।
translations.el: Το ταχυδρομείο είναι ακριβώς μετά τη γωνία.
translations.id: Kantor pos ada tepat di tikungan.
translations.ja: 郵便局は角を曲がってすぐです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, marking 'Post' as the subject.
Common noun (feminine) referring to the postal service/post office; head of the subject NP.
Auxiliary 'sein' (3rd sg, present) used as a copula linking the subject to a predicative locative expression.
Adverb functioning as an intensifier ('right/just'), modifying the PP to indicate close proximity.
Contraction of the preposition 'um' + article 'das'; functions as a preposition governing accusative in the idiom 'ums Eck'.
Common noun (regional/neuter); accusative object of 'um' in the PP 'ums Eck' ('around the corner').

sentences.target: Wir sitzen im Eck und trinken Kaffee.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈzɪtsən ɪm ɛk ʊnt ˈtrɪŋkən kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Wir sitzen im Eck und trinken Kaffee.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈzɪtsən ɪm ɛk ʊnt ˈtrɪŋkən kaˈfeː/
translations.en: We’re sitting in the corner and drinking coffee.
translations.es: Estamos sentados en un rincón tomando café.
translations.fr: On est assis dans un coin et on boit du café.
translations.it: Siamo seduti in un angolo e beviamo caffè.
translations.ko: 우리는 구석에 앉아 커피를 마시고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们坐在角落里喝咖啡。
translations.yue: 我哋喺角落坐住飲咖啡。
translations.ru: Мы сидим в углу и пьём кофе.
translations.pt: Estamos sentados no canto tomando café.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ngồi ở góc uống cà phê.
translations.ar: نحن نجلس في الركن ونشرب القهوة.
translations.nl: We zitten in de hoek en drinken koffie.
translations.uk: Ми сидимо в кутку і п’ємо каву.
translations.hu: A sarokban ülünk és kávét iszunk.
translations.hi: हम कोने में बैठे हैं और कॉफी पी रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Siedzimy w kącie i pijemy kawę.
translations.el: Καθόμαστε στη γωνία και πίνουμε καφέ.
translations.nb: Vi sitter i hjørnet og drikker kaffe.
translations.id: Kami duduk di sudut dan minum kopi.
translations.sv: Vi sitter i hörnet och dricker kaffe.
translations.ro: Stăm într-un colț și bem cafea.
translations.cs: Sedíme v rohu a pijeme kávu.
translations.da: Vi sidder i hjørnet og drikker kaffe.
translations.fi: Me istumme nurkassa ja juomme kahvia.
translations.ja: 私たちは隅に座ってコーヒーを飲んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative subject.
Main verb (1st pl, present); intransitive, denotes being seated.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative for static location.
Common noun (regional/neuter); dative object of 'in' indicating location.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicates with shared subject ('sitzen' and 'trinken').
Main verb (1st pl, present); transitive, second coordinated predicate.
Common noun (masculine); bare accusative object (mass noun) of 'trinken'.

sentences.target: Die Kiste steht schon im Eck.

translations.de: Die Kiste steht schon im Eck.
translations.en: The box is already in the corner.
translations.es: La caja ya está en el rincón.
translations.fr: La boîte est déjà dans le coin.
translations.zh-Hans: 箱子已经放在角落里了。
translations.pt: A caixa já está no canto.
translations.vi: Cái thùng đã ở góc rồi.
translations.nl: De doos staat al in de hoek.
translations.hu: A doboz már a sarokban van.
translations.hi: बक्सा पहले से ही कोने में रखा है।
translations.el: Το κιβώτιο είναι ήδη στη γωνία.
translations.ja: 箱はもう隅に置いてあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, marking 'Kiste' as the subject.
Common noun (feminine); head of the subject NP.
Main verb (3rd sg, present); stative position verb indicating location.
Adverb indicating temporal aspect ('already'); modifies the verb.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative for static location.
Common noun (regional/neuter); dative object of 'in' indicating location.

sentences.target: Das Sofa kommt ins Eck neben das Fenster.
sentences.reading: /das ˈzoːfa kɔmt ɪns ɛk ˈneːbən das ˈfɛnstɐ/

translations.de: Das Sofa kommt ins Eck neben das Fenster.
translations.ipa: /das ˈzoːfa kɔmt ɪns ɛk ˈneːbən das ˈfɛnstɐ/
translations.en: The sofa goes in the corner next to the window.
translations.es: El sofá va en el rincón junto a la ventana.
translations.fr: Le canapé va dans le coin près de la fenêtre.
translations.it: Il divano va nell’angolo accanto alla finestra.
translations.ko: 소파는 창문 옆 구석에 둘 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 沙发要摆在窗旁的角落。
translations.yue: 梳化會擺喺窗邊嘅角落。
translations.ru: Диван поставим в угол у окна.
translations.pt: O sofá vai no canto ao lado da janela.
translations.vi: Ghế sofa sẽ đặt ở góc cạnh cửa sổ.
translations.ar: الأريكة ستكون في الزاوية بجانب النافذة.
translations.nl: De bank komt in de hoek naast het raam.
translations.uk: Диван поставимо в куток біля вікна.
translations.hu: A kanapé a sarokba kerül, az ablak mellé.
translations.hi: सोफ़ा खिड़की के पास वाले कोने में जाएगा।
translations.pl: Sofa stanie w rogu obok okna.
translations.el: Ο καναπές θα μπει στη γωνία δίπλα στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Sofaen skal stå i hjørnet ved siden av vinduet.
translations.id: Sofa akan diletakkan di sudut sebelah jendela.
translations.sv: Soffan ska stå i hörnet bredvid fönstret.
translations.ro: Canapeaua va sta în colț, lângă fereastră.
translations.cs: Pohovka půjde do rohu vedle okna.
translations.da: Sofaen skal stå i hjørnet ved siden af vinduet.
translations.ja: ソファは窓のそばの隅に置きます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular neuter, marking 'Sofa' as the subject.
Common noun (neuter); head of the subject NP.
Main verb (3rd sg, present); motion/placement into a location; takes a directional complement.
Contraction of 'in' + 'das'; preposition governing accusative to indicate direction/goal.
Common noun (regional/neuter); accusative object of 'in' indicating the goal of motion.
Preposition expressing spatial adjacency; with dynamic reading here, it takes an accusative complement.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter marking 'Fenster' as the object of 'neben'.
Common noun (neuter); complement/object of the preposition 'neben'.

es: La oficina de correos está a la vuelta de la esquina.
Estamos sentados en un rincón tomando café.
La caja ya está en el rincón.
El sofá va en el rincón junto a la ventana.

On est assis dans un coin et on boit du café.
La boîte est déjà dans le coin.
Le canapé va dans le coin près de la fenêtre.

Siamo seduti in un angolo e beviamo caffè.
Il divano va nell’angolo accanto alla finestra.

소파는 창문 옆 구석에 둘 거예요.

箱子已经放在角落里了。

सोफ़ा खिड़की के पास वाले कोने में जाएगा।

Ο καναπές θα μπει στη γωνία δίπλα στο παράθυρο.
